import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Next state info
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_count_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, sq_count_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    agent_y_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Current state info
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_count_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, sq_count_s = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    agent_y_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # === SUCCESS CONDITION ===
    # Pyramid on grid, not held, adjacent (dist==1) to square
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    pyramid_on_grid_n = pyr_count_n > 0.5
    success = pyramid_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    success_reward = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0

    # === PHASE DETECTION ===
    holding_n_f = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s_f = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    just_picked_up = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_put_down = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    # === PHASE 1: Not holding — guide to pyramid ===
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - pyr_x_n)
    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - pyr_x_s)

    # Progress-based: reward getting closer to pyramid
    progress_to_pyr = (dist_agent_pyr_s - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist
    phase1_reward = (~holding_s).astype(jnp.float32) * (~holding_n).astype(jnp.float32) * progress_to_pyr * 2.0

    # === PICKUP BONUS ===
    pickup_bonus = just_picked_up.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # === PHASE 2: Holding — guide to be adjacent to square ===
    dist_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - sq_x_s)

    # Progress-based: reward getting closer to square
    progress_to_sq = (dist_agent_sq_s - dist_agent_sq_n) / max_dist
    phase2_reward = holding_s_f * holding_n_f * progress_to_sq * 2.0

    # Extra reward for being very close to square while holding
    # Agent needs to be distance 1 from square to put pyramid adjacent
    close_to_sq = holding_n_f * jnp.maximum(0.0, (3.0 - dist_agent_sq_n) / 3.0) * 0.5

    # === PUTDOWN REWARD ===
    # Reward based on how close pyramid ended up to square
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    # Big bonus if placed adjacent
    placed_adjacent = pyramid_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    putdown_adjacent_bonus = just_put_down.astype(jnp.float32) * placed_adjacent.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0
    # Smaller reward based on proximity when placed
    putdown_proximity = just_put_down.astype(jnp.float32) * pyramid_on_grid_n.astype(jnp.float32) * \
        jnp.maximum(0.0, (max_dist - dist_pyr_sq_n) / max_dist) * 1.0

    # === PENALTY for putting down when not near square ===
    # Discourage random putdowns
    placed_far = pyramid_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5)
    putdown_penalty = just_put_down.astype(jnp.float32) * placed_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-0.5)

    total_reward = (
        phase1_reward
        + pickup_bonus
        + phase2_reward
        + close_to_sq
        + putdown_adjacent_bonus
        + putdown_proximity
        + putdown_penalty
        + success_reward
    )

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
